productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Simple Messenger Blue Handbags
description: The Simple messenger bag from belkin offers plush comfort to your laptop. With loads of organiser space, this bag offers 360 degree access to all your gear when on the go. Laptop size: 15.6" Made of polyester Padded laptop compartment with a fabric inner lining Zippered organizational storage pocket in the front, with a pouch at the back Adjustable shoulder strap with a padded holder Haul loop for carrying ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
